streams.pump_role: single feed containing all reagents premixed in DES
streams.reasoning: From Chemistry Plan stream_logic: All reagents premixed in DES as single feed. Phenylacetylene must be present when nitrile oxide forms in situ to trap it and prevent dimerization. Engineering calculations set reactor concentration at 0.0667 M and total flow rate at 0.500 mL/min.

mixing_order_reasoning: From Chemistry Plan: All reagents are premixed in the DES at room temperature before entering the heated coil reactor. No separate mixing stage needed since substrates are mutually compatible at ambient temperature.
pre_reactor_steps: Preheat feed line to 40-50°C to reduce DES viscosity and aid pumpability
post_reactor_steps: Collect product stream for offline workup (water quench, DCM extraction, drying over MgSO4)
chemistry_notes: Thermal 1,3-dipolar cycloaddition driven by in-situ nitrile oxide generation at 120°C. Engineering calculations show Pe = 17 (significant axial dispersion) and Da = 19.7 (mass-transfer limited), but single premixed stream eliminates mixing limitations. DES viscosity (~50-100 cP at RT) requires wider tubing (1.0 mm ID) and optional feed preheating. BPR required due to gas generation during nitrile oxide formation. No photochemistry involved - purely thermal process.

reasoning_per_field.residence_time_min: Engineering calculation estimated 1.5 min (range 1.0-2.2 min) based on 10× intensification factor from batch time of 15 min. No analogies available.
reasoning_per_field.flow_rate_mL_min: Engineering calculation: total flow rate 0.500 mL/min to achieve target residence time with reactor volume.
reasoning_per_field.temperature_C: Same as batch (120°C) - required for thermal nitrile oxide generation from ethyl nitroacetate.
reasoning_per_field.concentration_M: Engineering calculation: reactor concentration 0.0667 M based on limiting reagent flow rate and total flow.
reasoning_per_field.BPR_bar: Engineering calculation: BPR required at 5.0 bar due to gas generation during nitrile oxide formation (Henry's law considerations).
reasoning_per_field.reactor_type: Chemistry Plan specifies coil reactor for thermal reaction.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_material: PFA chosen for high temperature operation (120°C) and chemical compatibility with DES.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_ID_mm: Engineering calculation: 1.0 mm ID to handle DES viscosity while maintaining reasonable pressure drop (0.003 bar).
reasoning_per_field.reactor_volume_mL: Engineering calculation: 0.75 mL reactor volume (d=1.0mm, L=0.95m) to achieve target residence time.
reasoning_per_field.wavelength_nm: Chemistry Plan confirms no photochemistry - purely thermal reaction.
reasoning_per_field.deoxygenation_method: Chemistry Plan confirms no oxygen sensitivity - reaction proceeds in air.
